data.title: 国际服「The Promise At Sunset」MV公开特别礼物
data.summary: [Celebratory coupon gift for the MV release!] To celebrate the release, we’ve prepared a special cou
data.body:
[Celebratory coupon gift for the MV release!]

To celebrate the release, we’ve prepared a special coupon for you that can be exchanged for Pyroxenes and Proficiency Certificates. Don’t forget to check it out~!

➡️Official Youtube: https://youtu.be/PxmdydKnvS8
🗓️Use Period: Until 2/8 (Sat), 2:59 PM (UTC)
➡️View Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2718327

#BlueArchive
